subtitle: Auto-render from your doc
desc: Already have Mermaid code? Render everything in one click.

steps.title: Write Mermaid syntax
steps.desc: Place your diagram code inside a code block in your Google Doc.

steps.title: Run the renderer
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Code to Diagrams. Every diagram gets rendered.

steps.title: Insert into your document
steps.desc: Preview each diagram, then click Insert or Replace. Done.

subtitle: Use the built-in editor
desc: Write diagrams from scratch with live preview and templates.

steps.title: Open the editor
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Insert Mermaid Diagram.

steps.title: Write and preview
steps.desc: Write or paste Mermaid syntax on the left, see the live preview update on the right.

steps.title: Insert into your document
steps.desc: Pick a template to get started quickly, then click Insert at Cursor.

subtitle: Fix pasted markdown
desc: Copied Mermaid code from a markdown file or another tool? Google Docs corrupts it. Fix it in one step.

steps.title: Open Fix Copied Markdown
steps.desc: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Fix Copied Markdown.

steps.title: Paste your broken code
steps.desc: Paste the corrupted markdown. The tool shows a side-by-side diff of what it will fix.

steps.title: Copy the fixed result
steps.desc: Click Copy Fixed and paste it back into your doc — ready to render.
